summary: Tested IB pushed data endpoints with LIVE data flowing from user's local IB Gateway. All 13/14 tests passed (93%). One timeout failure was network-related, not code issue. IB pusher successfully pushing 14 quotes, 3 positions, and Level 2 data for SPY/QQQ/IWM.

minor.issue: Intermittent network timeout during testing (network latency to preview environment)

ib_status_pusher_info.details: Returns pusher.connected, pusher.last_update, pusher.quotes_count (14), pusher.positions_count (3), connection_source

ib_pushed_data_quotes.details: Returns quotes for VIX (24.35), SPY (678.44), QQQ (608.76), IWM, DIA, XOM, CVX, CF, NTR, NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, AMD (14 total)

ib_pushed_data_positions.details: Returns 3 positions: TMC (10000 shares), INTC (1000 shares), TSLA (101 shares)

ib_level2_spy.details: Returns 5 bids, 5 asks with imbalance calculation (-0.147)

ib_level2_qqq.details: Returns 5 bids, 5 asks with Level 2 order book data

ib_pushed_quote_vix.details: Returns VIX price 24.35 (user expected ~24.55), source=ib_pusher. High: 26.01, Low: 22.19

alpaca_quote_prefer_ib.details: Falls back to Alpaca when pusher data is stale (>30 seconds). Expected behavior - pusher must be continuously running for IB source

alpaca_quote_force_alpaca.details: Returns Alpaca data as source when prefer_ib=false

config_test_connection.details: Ollama connected via http_proxy. Models: deepseek-r1:8b, gpt-oss:120b-cloud, gemma3:4b, llama3:8b, qwen2.5:7b

script_ib_data_pusher.details: Serves 33200 bytes, contains IBDataPusher class, ib_insync, push_data_to_cloud method

script_start_trading_bat.details: Serves 10766 bytes, contains paperesw100000 credentials, CLOUD_URL variable

critical_code_review_comments: IB pusher integration working correctly with live data flowing
Level 2 order book data properly captured with 5 levels each for bids/asks
VIX data being pushed from CBOE via IB Gateway
Alpaca fallback correctly triggers when pusher data is stale (>30s threshold)
is_pusher_connected() function correctly checks 30-second freshness window
StartTrading.bat contains paper trading credentials (paperesw100000) as expected
All API responses properly exclude MongoDB _id fields
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live IB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: IB data pusher integration fully tested with LIVE data. Pusher pushes 14 quotes (VIX, SPY, QQQ, IWM, DIA, XOM, CVX, CF, NTR, NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, AMD), 3 positions (TMC, INTC, TSLA), and Level 2 order book for SPY/QQQ/IWM. Pusher data becomes stale after 30 seconds without fresh pushes - this is expected. When stale, Alpaca fallback is used. Account DUN615665 has ~$994K net liquidation, ~$3.7M buying power.
rca_of_issues: Network timeout on first test was due to network latency to preview environment, not a code issue. All endpoints verified working via direct curl tests.
